# tfe_tag_policy_set_exclusion

Provides a resource which manages tag exclusions on a policy set.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) The tag key for the exclusion.
- `policy_set_id` (String) The ID of the policy set to add the tag exclusion to.

### Optional

- `value` (String) The tag value for the tag exclusion. If not set, this becomes a key-only tag and only matches workspaces that also have a key-only tag with the given key.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The composite ID of the tag exclusion, in the format <POLICY_SET_ID>/<TAG_KEY> or <POLICY_SET_ID>/<TAG_KEY>/<TAG_VALUE>.
